content: Just as triple hybrid retrieval unites dense-vector semantic matching, sparse-vector keyword alignment, and full-text context to overcome the gaps of single-method retrieval for RAG systems, a triple-layer hybrid sales prospecting AI agent can combine semantic intent matching of buyer content, sparse high-intent keyword filtering, and full lead profile context to surface far higher-quality qualified prospects than current single or dual-method prospecting agents. This combined architecture would resolve the common flaw of modern prospecting AI that either misses hidden high-intent leads through overly rigid keyword filtering or surfaces unqualified leads from vague semantic similarity matches.
